name: Monthly Revenue Report
query:
SELECT
    name as "Invoice:Link/Quickfix:120",
    customer_name as "Customer:Data:150",
    invoice_date as "Date:Date:100",
    total_amount as "Revenue:Currency:120",
    payment_status as "Status:Data:100"
FROM
    `tabQuickfix`
WHERE
    invoice_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
    AND payment_status = 'Paid'
    AND docstatus = 1
